statement: NVIDIA B200 secondary-market hardware price approximately $45k (MSRP $40k) per third-party pricing index.
why: Third-party pricing indexes list B200 purchase price since NVIDIA does not publish list prices; a static price level with no stated baseline change.

impact.mechanism: Reference hardware price level for B200; display overlay that does not score demand or supply.

confidence.basis: Secondary third-party pricing aggregator (gpucost.org); vendor does not publish list prices.
